title: Verify trial widget displays for Day 0-1 trial users
description: Test that the persistent trial widget appears on homepage for users on Day 0 or Day 1 of their trial
preconditions: User has activated a trial within 0-1 days

steps.description: 1. Log in with a user account that has Day 0-1 trial active
3. Verify trial widget is visible with shield/clock icon
4. Verify widget displays 'Trial Mode: X Days Remaining'

expected_result: Trial widget is prominently displayed on homepage with correct remaining days
